steps.title: Translate 130% greater into an equation for f
steps.content:
If $f$ is 130% greater than $g$, then $f$ equals $g$ plus 130% of $g$:
$$f = g + 1.30g = 2.30g$$

steps.title: Translate 80% less into an equation for h
steps.content:
If $h$ is 80% less than $f$, then $h$ is 20% of $f$ (since 100% - 80% = 20%):
$$h = 0.20f$$

steps.title: Substitute to express h in terms of g
steps.content:
Substitute $f = 2.30g$ into the equation for $h$:
$$h = 0.20(2.30g) = 0.46g$$
This means $h$ is 0.46 times $g$. That confirms B is correct.
